name: Show Subclasses
title: Show Subclasses
description: Traverse subclass_of edges from the selected class to find its subclasses (current edges only).
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 INBOUND node subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Superclasses
title: Show Superclasses
description: Reverse-traverse subclass_of edges to find ancestor classes (current edges only).
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Properties
title: Show Properties
description: Traverse has_property edges from the selected class to show its properties (current edges only).
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node has_property
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Full Hierarchy
title: Show Full Hierarchy
description: Multi-hop subclass_of traversal (up to depth 10) to show the full class hierarchy (current edges only).
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..10 ANY node subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 200
    RETURN e

name: Show Related Classes
title: Show Related Classes
description: Traverse related_to edges from the selected class (current edges only).
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY node related_to
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Cross-Tier Links
title: Show Cross-Tier Links
description: Traverse extends_domain edges to show links between local (Tier 2) and domain (Tier 1) classes.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY node extends_domain
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Version History
title: Show Version History
description: Query all versions of the selected entity by matching its URI across all created/expired pairs.
queryText:
FOR node IN @nodes
  LET uri = node.uri
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.uri == uri
    SORT cls.created DESC
    RETURN cls

name: Show Provenance
title: Show Provenance
description: Traverse extracted_from edges to trace the selected entity back to its source document chunks.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, documents, chunks, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node extracted_from
    LIMIT 50
    RETURN e

name: Full Neighborhood
title: Full Neighborhood
description: Expand all current relationships 1-2 hops from the selected node.
queryText:
WITH ontology_classes, ontology_properties, ontology_constraints, subclass_of, equivalent_class, has_property, extends_domain, extracted_from, related_to, merge_candidate, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FOR v, e IN 1..2 ANY node GRAPH 'domain_ontology'
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e
